body:
yes

--- DKIESQ@aol.com wrote:

> Can Peg close the office at 3:00 today?  Please
> advise.

yes

--- DKIESQ@aol.com wrote:

Can Peg close the office at 3:00 today? Please
advise.

Darren

Date: Thu, 13 Oct 2005 08:11:44 -0400
To: dKIESQ@aol.com
From: Peg Ugland pegu@naproperty.com
Subject: NAPI office

Darren,
Tomorrow (Friday) afternoon is our United Way
campaign finale party at the
Country Club from 3:00 to 6:00. Would it be Ok to
close the office? If
not, I can stay as I would like everyone else to go.
Please let me know.
Thanks.
Peg
